summary: Tested 3 fixes: 1) CV optimization prompt now includes explicit title instruction, 2) Passerelles endpoint enriched with passport context, 3) New /api/learning/recommendations endpoint. All 12 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend LearningSection verified - shows static modules, AI recommendations section hidden for new users without CV (expected behavior).

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - minor accessibility issue (pre-existing)

critical_code_review_comments: CV optimization prompt (cv.py line 59-63): Now includes 'Le champ titre du CV DOIT être l'intitulé exact du poste de l'offre' - VERIFIED
Passerelles function (passport.py line 76-133): Now accepts passport parameter with professional_summary, career_project, experiences context - VERIFIED
Learning recommendations endpoint (jobs.py line 169-265): New endpoint generates AI-powered training recommendations based on CV and passport - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - tests create their own test accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Learning recommendations feature tested. Backend endpoint GET /api/learning/recommendations?token= returns has_data=false when no CV analyzed, returns up to 6 AI-generated training recommendations when CV exists. Response includes title, provider, type, duration, skills_developed, relevance_reason, cpf_eligible, priority fields. Frontend LearningSection (data-testid='learning-section') shows AI recommendations section (data-testid='ai-recommendations-section') only when has_data=true. Passerelles endpoint now uses enriched passport context (professional_summary, career_project, experiences). CV optimization prompt explicitly instructs to use job offer title as CV title.

backend_apis: GET /api/learning/recommendations?token= - returns has_data=false when no CV (PASSED)
GET /api/passport/passerelles?token= - returns passerelles with enriched context (PASSED)
GET /api/learning/recommendations with CV data - AI recommendations generation (PASSED)
frontend_flows: 'Modules de formation' section with static modules displayed (PASSED)
AI recommendations section hidden for new user without CV (PASSED - expected behavior)

cv_optimization_prompt.change: Added explicit instruction: 'Le champ titre du CV DOIT être l'intitulé exact du poste de l'offre d'emploi'

passerelles_enrichment.change: Function generate_passerelles_with_ai now accepts passport parameter with professional_summary, career_project, experiences for richer context

learning_recommendations_endpoint.change: New GET /api/learning/recommendations endpoint that generates AI-powered personalized training recommendations

/api/learning/recommendations.has_data: boolean - false when no CV/passport data
/api/learning/recommendations.recommendations: array of up to 6 training objects

recommendation_object.title: string - exact training title
recommendation_object.relevance_reason: string - why relevant for this profile
